$comment: add_file: add ONE new Go file to a PERSISTENT workspace (a module you keep), from a free-text request. Reads the module state + its existing API (so the new file calls real names), generates a grounded file, then go vet + go test the WHOLE module (stage_check), repairs once, and records it. Operator-facing: `ratchet flow . add_file --ws <proj> "<path> <request>"`; $input splits into path + request. proj = $workspace. Like compose's add_unit but request-driven, not spec-driven, and on a kept workspace.
summary: Add a new Go file to a workspace from a request; grounded on the module's existing API, verified with go vet + go test, repaired once, recorded.
